questions.question: What Southeast Asian city did the U.S. open an embassy in, in 1995?
What movie classic has James Stewart sigh: "I suppose it'd been better if I'd never been born at all"?
What make of car did a retired race driver named Enzo unveil in 1947?
What does the newly discovered hormone orexin encourage animals to do?
What pitcher is the all-time major league leader in losses?
What "relationship" book spent a record 193 weeks atop the hardcover nonfiction best-seller list, from 1994 to 1996?
questions.answer: Men Are From Mars, Women Are From Venus
